plot_frame_box.description: Axis box detected by longest dark runs (vertical cols 71 & 785 each ~356 rows tall; horizontal rows 37 & 392 each ~715 cols wide). Top of frame coincides with row 37; bottom at row 392.

data_to_pixel_formula.col: col = (x_value - b_x) / m_x   where m_x = 0.00730993, b_x = -0.127186, x_value in category-index space (Q1=1..Q5=5)

x_axis.note: Categorical axis Q1..Q5 indexed 1..5; group tick centers at cols 154, 291, 428, 565, 701.

worked_example.verification: Bar at category-tick col 154 has fill-top row 257; matches detected (cx=120 bar-center col is offset -34 from tick by series-offset). For bar-top at (cx=120, row=257) the y-value 41.82 round-trips.

frame.method: Dark threshold (<80 gray) longest-run scan; vertical cols 71 & 785 with run length 356; horizontal rows 37 & 392 with run length ~715.

x_ticks.method: Detect dark tick marks in rows 393..399 below plot frame; group by gap<=4.

y_ticks.method: Detect dark tick marks in cols 64..70 left of plot frame; group by gap<=4.

bar_extraction.method: Per series, color-mask plot interior (BGR tol 15) excluding legend box rows 48..125 cols 78..230. Per column, count colored pixels; group runs of cols with count>5 (gap<=2) into bar bounding boxes. Bar center = mean(x0,x1); bar top row = topmost colored row in bar's column span.

series_offsets_from_group_tick_px.note: Empirically derived from detected bar centroids: each bar centered at (group_tick + series_offset). Bar width 33 px.

error_caps.method: For each bar, in a column band cx +/- 10 px, count dark (<80) pixels per row (legend region masked). Rows with dark-count >= 7 are cap candidates; group by gap<=2. Upper cap = topmost group above bar top; lower cap = bottommost group below bar top (inside bar fill).

calibration_residuals.comment: Linear fits perfect to within sub-pixel.
